title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface); runs entirely in browser, no external services.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API and Spring Boot starter available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Community-built interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with prompts, history, and markdown rendering.

title: Ollama-Gateway
summary: Lightweight Cloudflare Worker that exposes an OpenAI-compatible endpoint backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot (VS Code)
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s sidebar chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models in RAG pipelines via Haystack 2.x.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, dependency injection helpers, and minimal API example.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; supports chat, generate, pull, and embeddings.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container and exposes it to your CI pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda 8 connector that invokes Ollama models inside BPMN processes for human-task summarization.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client with GenServer-backed connection pooling and LiveView chat example.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot (reddit showcase)
summary: Reddit user open-sources a Gradio-based RAG chatbot that ingests PDFs into Chroma and chats via Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes and Q&A over your vault.
